---
title: "Download"
description-meta: "Download openme for macOS, iOS, Android, Windows, and Linux — native apps and CLI client."
keywords: [openme download, openme macOS, openme iOS, openme Android, openme Windows, openme Linux, openme CLI]
toc: false
css: download.css
---

{{< include _core.qmd >}}

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  renderHero(detectOS(), true);
  renderAllPlatforms();
});
</script>
